sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The board changed after SPACE. Let me compare what changed between the previous frame and current frame to understand what SPACE did something. Let me check the gray squares in the middle - did they change color?

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after SPACE
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after['nodes']}

# Check gray squares (ids 14-17)
for i in [14, 15, 16, 17]:
    bn = before_nodes.get(i)
    an = after_nodes.get(i)
    if bn and an:
        print(f"id={i} color: {bn['color']} -> {an['color']}")

# Also check bottom squares (ids 22-25)
for i in [22, 23, 24, 25]:
    bn = before_nodes.get(i)
    an = after_nodes.get(i)
    if bn and an:
        print(f"id={i} color: {bn['color']} -> {an['color']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL RESULT: python
sections.content:
id=14 color: g -> g
id=15 color: g -> g
id=16 color: g -> g
id=17 color: g -> g
id=22 color: N -> c
id=23 color: p -> N
id=24 color: b -> p
id=25 color: Y -> b

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
SPACE shifted the bottom colored squares! The bottom squares cycled:
- id=22: N -> c (green) -> c (charcoal/disappeared)
- id=23: p (purple) -> N (green)
- id=24: b (blue) -> p (purple)
- id=25: Y (yellow) -> b (blue)
So SPACE shifts the bottom row left. The first element disappears and the rest shift left. This is a rotation mechanism.
Top order: blue, green, yellow, purple
Bottom order was: green, purple, blue, yellow
After 1 SPACE: charcoal, green, purple, blue
After 1 more SPACEs:
After 2 SPACEs: green, purple, blue, yellow -> charcoal, green, purple, blue
After 3 SPACEs: purple, blue, -> charcoal, green, purple
After 4 SPACEs: blue, -> charcoal, green

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# SPACE shifts bottom row left. Let me try MOUSE on the bottom squares to see if we can swap/select
# First let me try clicking on the first SPACE again to see the pattern
action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
